transcript.text:
(The current time...)
(But it's 6AM?!) It's the early morning
(Since it was early morning, I didn't really have an appetite...)
(A complete Korean meal)
(that will wake you right up is coming!)
(Morning binge) Bon appétit
(I repeat, it's dawn)
(Eating energy)
(is increasing)
Wow, this is a real homecooked meal
Completely
There's nothing to leave behind
(Eating energy gauge)
(Increase that eating energy) Excuse me, can I get one more bowl of rice?
(from dawn!) Excuse me, can I get one more bowl of rice?
Do you eat 5 bowls of rice?!

(Ate with full energy since the early morning...) Wow, you have to try this! It's a must!
Really...
It's really delicious
(This place where lights shine brightly in Cheonggyecheon)
(A wholesale clothing market, Pyounghwa Market)
Hello everyone
Today, I came near Pyounghwa Market at Dongdaemun
(It's dark, there's no sun...) The sun has set
It's not night, it's the dawn!
(Current time 6:05AM!) It's 6AM
(I can't miss out on that early morning vibe) It's good to eat in the early morning
(Early morning market meal!) I came here because I was craving a nice Korean meal
There are lines during lunch, it's a famous place
(A good restaurant that attracted foreigners too!) It's a Korean restaurant but I heard a lot of foreigners go there too
I've been to Cheongnyangni "Gwangju Sikdang"
and Jongno "Seungwoonae Sikdang"

But there's this vibe when you eat in the early morning
(Among all these old places,) There are so many places with that old vibe
I want to go to all of them
(Located at Jongno-gu, Seoul)
("Jeonju Jip")
Oh? Hello!
(Golden brown grilled fish welcomes you) Wow fish! Looks good
These get grilled here
(Entered) Hello
Hello
It smells delicious! Haha
I'll quickly eat before other customers come!
I didn't know
but there are many famous places nearby
(Proof that it's a good restaurant) This place has been around for 40 years!
What is good here?

For the fish, choose what you like
(The grilled fish and stir-fried squid are the 2 most popular ones) The marbled rockfish is new, it's just been a couple days
so it's not there as assorted
You eat a lot
Did you starve for a couple days?
I ate dinner last night!
(A big eater) Then, you're a big eater??
(And a Korean meal menu) The popular stir-fried squid
I need to eat stir-fried spicy pork too
Which one is the most popular among doenjang-jjigae, kimchi-jjigae, and cheonggukjang?
Here, whatever you like the most is the best
All of them are delicious
(There's a problem...) My favorite fish is halibut and...
(I have too many favorites... Haha)
(Time to order)
Can I get the halibut set, hairtail set,

kimchi-jjigae, doenjang-jjigae,
stir-fried spicy pork,
and stir-fried squid please?
I give the halibut on the house
when you order a lot!
So you should order a different fish
Really?
Halibut is my favorite so I want to eat a lot of that haha
- Really? - Then, I'll just get halibut
One is a lot!
(I like it) More, more
(Order complete!) Thank you
(The delicious smell of grilled fish)
(attracts customers from early morning..!)
(While the fish is being grilled outside...)
(you can smell the familiar homecooked meals in the restaurant...!)

Thank you!!
You usually get 2 halibut
but I got 1 on the house!
When you order more than 3 dishes,
you get 1 halibut on the house
(The rest of the dishes are coming out...)
Thank you
Wow, looks delicious! Bon appétit!
A complete Korean meal for breakfast
I'm happy
(Getting ready for combat haha)
(Starting with the stir-fried squid) Wow, squid! Whole squid!
(Looks more plentiful because it's whole squid) There a lot of squid
Look how plump it is! It's so plump
As expected, ingredients
at markets are really good

Wow, look at the legs...!!
(I give it 1,000/10 for how it looks!) Why are the legs so huge?
It's no joke
I'll try it
Wow, the sauce is amazing!
It's not dry, it's spicy
(You're the best...!) Is it good?
(You're the best...!) The marinade is so good
The marinade is so good?
It's a deliciously-made homecooked meal
(That eating energy at 6AM.. Hahaha)
A bite of kimchi-jjigae too!
The soup first
It's a bit bland
(What did you spill...?)
I should've taken the apron when it was offered.. Haha

"Oh it's okay...!"
is what I said...
Wow, the kimchi-jjigae

The hairtail is huge

(Removing the side bones first...!)
Wow, it's nice and hot
so the bones come off easily
(The whole hairtail...???) Wow, should I just hold it up and eat it?
I wanted to do this since it's so big
(Huge)
(Okay, that's it...) That was enough
The grilled fish is so delicious!
(I can't just throw it away)
(Super focused)

(Successfully separated the bones...!)
(It's so delicious, I'm so annoyed)
You have to try the grilled fish and the stir-fried squid
The fish is very fresh
It's so tender
Salty
It's so good
(The current eating energy level is the highest...!)
I want to do that from the cartoon
when just the bones come out
(Don't think it's going to work, but she always does it...)
(Risky)
(If it doesn't work, it doesn't work) A cartoon is a cartoon
(90% successful for the small piece! Haha)
(Next up, stir-fried spicy pork!) Why does the stir-fried spicy pork looks so good?
Look at the color

(Complimenting myself hehe) I did such a good job finding this place
It's so delicious
(Going for the halibut!) Should I try the halibut?
(Big size) Wow, it's huge!
(Removing the side bones)
(I can't just throw it away) I have to eat this too
(She eats better than those in cartoons...)
Wow, the fish
in this place are all big!
It's my first time eating halibut this big in a while!
(Haha she's eating so well)
I've never seen someone hold a whole halibut
and even chew on the bones...
(Gulp)
It's so delicious...
(This is her eating at 6 in the morning)

(Finished the halibut in an instant...!!)
(The long-awaited doenjang-jjigae time!) It's time to eat doenjang-jjigae
Doenjang-jjigae is the best when it comes to Korean meals!
Everyone, don't come here alone...
You should come as a group...!!
You have to try the stir-fried squid
and the grilled fish
(You have to try all of the delicious food) and the stir-fried spicy pork
They're all delicious
Excuse me, can I get one more bowl of rice?
There's definitely
a lot of good restaurants near markets, you have to live near a market
Eat this for breakfast
and then film lunch
Buy fried chicken for dinner and go home
Market fried chicken

(Should I move...?) It sounds amazing
It's tasty
I'll remove the bones nicely
(Hehe)
Wasabi!
(Tzuyang train is out of control...)
It's so good
(Was it a warmup so far...?) I'll officially start eating now
(That eating energy!!!)
(Eventually getting more...) Can I get one more bowl of rice?
(What?)
Is your stomach okay, miss?!!
(I want to eat more!!) It's fine!
You look like you'd only eat half a bowl of rice
(Bright) Where did it all go?
Did you eat it secretly?

(Right, you tricked me) Without me knowing?
3 bowls! Oh my gosh!
It's so delicious
(But still... Haha) Wow... you eat so much
What's your waistline?
26...??
(Something's off here...)
Thank you
I want to take this marinade home and mix it with rice..!!
(Wait, mix it with rice...?)
(I can do that!!)
(Tzuyang's food idea shines again today...)
I'll add some stir-fried spicy pork
(Adding a lot)
(Adding the hot rice!!)
She heated them up for me

- (Enjoy) - Looks delicious
(Why is it already delicious when I haven't tried it yet...?)
Bon appétit!
(It's so good that it's ridiculous)
Wow, this is so delicious...!!
The owner is watching a mukbang haha
It's fascinating
She ate 3 bowls of rice?
I didn't eat much today
You only ate a little bit of fish
since it's the morning and you don't have an appetite
You can finish the assorted fish usually, right?
That's right
(Suddenly serious mode)
It's so delicious that I might act dramatic
(I'm watching you) The owner is supressing it

(Controlling the dramatics haha) I can't be dramatic
because she's watching
You can!
(She moved out of the way so that Tzuyang can be dramatic haha)
It's a bit sweet
But it's deliciously sweet
(Huh? Where did the grilled fish go?)
She's heating up the fish for me
(Hehe... She's the best...!) Yep
(The grilled fish and kimchi-jjigae came out just in time!) Thank you!
Wow thank you
Ma'am!
(Ordering it to-go! Haha) Can you package stir-fried spicy pork and stir-fried squid to-go please?
(All right, I'll make it deliciously for you) Okay
- Thanks - Don't mention it
(Remove all the bones first)

Fish
On top
(Do you usually eat grilled fish like this?)
I feel relieved when I film
an early morning mukbang
(So happy with the morning vibe and the delicious food) It's so delicious with a great vibe
I love it
(Please recommend me some in the comments!) Please recommend me good early breakfast restaurants
What? You finished it all?
(Almost finished haha)
(You finished it when I left for a bit) You finished it all while I was gone for a second
That's amazing
(Cleared the grilled fish just in time!)
Your belly is the same...
Where did it all go? Hahaha
(So fascinating) Her belly is the same

(After finishing every last drop of the doenjang-jjigae and kimchi-jjigae...!)
("Jeonju Jip" ALL CLEAR!)
(Haha)
I knew she ate a lot
but I didn't know it was to this extent
Even when 6 people eat this, they can't finish it
(You ate it easily...) You ate everything
You also had 3 bowls of rice
(It's all because of your delicious food!!) It was so delicious
Anyway, thank you for eating so well
Thank you for enjoying it
I ate so well, it was so delicious
Once again, I enjoyed today's meal!
